t_ch: 我…还是不愿思考这种可能性。
t_en: I... do not wish to consider this possibility.

t_ch: 也许他们只是无法转移火种，但设法逃走了…吧。
t_en: Perhaps they were just unable to transfer the Coreflame, but managed to escape...

t_ch: 我们得去「启蒙王座」一趟。
t_en: We have to go to the Luminary Throne.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>启蒙王座</color>…这是个什么地方？学院为什么会有王座？
t_en: The <color=#dbc291ff>Luminary Throne</color>? What sort of place is that? Why would there be a throne in an academy?

t_ch: 那是保管{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}火种的地方，就在巨木顶部。照他的说法，火种应该还在那里。
t_en: It is located at the top of the giant tree and is where {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces'{RUBY_E#} Coreflame is kept. According to Anaxa, the Coreflame should still be there.

t_ch: 不过，要想去到那儿…可没老师说得这么轻巧。
t_en: But making our way there... won't be as simple as the professor made it sound.

t_ch: 喔…不过，往好处想，那听起来倒像是个易守难攻的地方。
t_en: Oh... But on the bright side, it sounds like a place that's easy to defend and difficult to attack.

t_ch: 如果真是这样，我想大家，还有那刻夏，肯定会没事的！
t_en: If that's really the case, I think that everyone including Anaxa will definitely be all right!

t_ch: 也是…路上看看他还有没有为我们留下类似的指引吧。
t_en: Right... Let's see whether he left any similar directions for us along the way.
Huh...?

t_ch: 好像没人啊…刚才那歌声是幻觉吗？
t_en: There's no one here... Did I just imagine that singing?

t_ch: 不，不是幻觉，我也听到了。
t_en: No, you didn't imagine it. I heard it as well.

t_ch: 恐怕有人就在附近，不知是敌是友…各位小心。
t_en: I'm afraid that someone's probably nearby. As we are unable to ascertain whether they are friend or foe... we better remain cautious.

t_ch: 「十二星宿如目，巨人举杯对酌……」
t_en: "Giants raised their glasses in a toast beheld by the twelve constellations..."

t_ch: 又来了！这次声音是在……
t_en: It's that voice again! This time, it's coming from...

t_ch: …判断不出来，这图书馆也回声太大啦！
t_en: ...I have no clue where it's coming from. There's too much echo in this library!

t_ch: 所以说图书馆里禁止喧哗。
t_en: That's why you're supposed to keep quiet in a library.

t_ch: 人家知道！再说了，又不是人家在唱歌……
t_en: I know! Also, I wasn't even the one singing...

t_ch: 别怕，我有捉鬼工作经验！
t_en: Don't be afraid, I have experience in ghost hunting!

t_ch: 你怎么还干过这个…？
t_en: Why do you even have experience in that...?

t_ch: …找到了。
t_en: ...Found it.

t_ch: 声音是从…那边发出来的。
t_en: The voice is coming from... over there.

t_ch: 心脏？
t_en: The heart?

t_ch: 心脏怎么可能说话——而且它都不亮！人家觉得，肯定是有什么超自然的存在在捣鬼……
t_en: How can a heart possibly speak — and it's not even lit up! I think that something supernatural must be at play here...

t_ch: 空气？
t_en: The air?

t_ch: 空气怎么可能说话啦。人家觉得，肯定是有什么超自然的存在在捣鬼……
t_en: How can the air possibly speak! I think that something supernatural must be at play here...

t_ch: 仙女木？
t_en: White Dryads?

t_ch: 仙女木…又是刚才那样的，死去仙女木的影子吗？
t_en: White Dryads... Shadows of dead white dryads just like before?

t_ch: 不，是那边更远的地方——
t_en: No, it seems to be coming from somewhere even further that way...

t_ch: 一尊雕像，状似身披长袍、盘坐冥想的老翁……
t_en: A statue resembling an old man draped in robes, seated in deep meditation...

t_ch: …状似身披长袍、盘坐冥想，还会唱歌的老翁。
t_en: ...resembling an old man, draped in robes, seated in deep meditation, and capable of singing.

t_ch: （盯着雕像）
t_en: (Stare at the statue)

t_ch: （抚摸雕像）
t_en: (Stroke the statue)

t_ch: （敲打雕像）
t_en: (Knock on the statue)

t_ch: 啊呀…就算这样，顽石也无法开口说话呢。
t_en: Ha... Regardless of what you do, a stone won't be able to speak.

t_ch: <size=36>哇——谁——？！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Whoa... Who's there!?</size>

t_ch: 呵呵…这小兔子，真是活泼，还有种熟悉的味道。
t_en: Hehe... Such a lively little bunny. You even smell a little familiar.

t_ch: 这鬼还挺好看。
t_en: What a good-looking ghost.

t_ch: 好个舌灿莲花的孩子…吾就承蒙夸奖了。
t_en: What a smooth-talking child... I'll accept your praise.

t_ch: 呔！妖怪，吃我一棍！
t_en: Ha! Demon, eat my bat!

t_ch: 好个猴急的孩子…着急可吃不得热燕麦粥哪。
t_en: What an impatient child... Don't you know that haste makes waste?

t_ch: …你是谁？保持距离，表明身份，否则后果自负。
t_en: ...Who are you? Keep your distance and identify yourself. Otherwise, you'll face the consequences.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的气息…吾认得汝，哀地里亚的死亡女神可是声名在外。
t_en: The scent of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}... I recognize you. Aidonia's renowned Goddess of Death.

t_ch: 既然你清楚，那就别再挑衅「死亡」的权威——回答我的问题。
t_en: Since you are aware, stop provoking the authority of Death. Answer my question.

t_ch: 呵呵，张牙舞爪…真可爱。
t_en: Hehe, baring your fangs at me... How cute.

t_ch: 就唤吾为<color=#dbc291ff>卡吕普索</color>罢，也代七贤人与「莲食学派」向各位致意。
t_en: Just call me <color=#dbc291ff>Calypso</color>. I greet you on behalf of the Seven Sages and the Lotophagists.

t_ch: 老师好！
t_en: Hi, professor!

t_ch: 道理我都懂，那…你是个幽灵？
t_en: I understand what you're saying, but... are you a specter?

t_ch: 当然不是。问问身旁这位淑女罢，她一定明白个中缘由。
t_en: Of course not. Just ask the fair lady beside you. She'll definitely know the reason why.

t_ch: 小心，{NICKNAME}…虽然「莲食学派」的所有者从未以真面目示人，但此人断不能轻易信任。
t_en: Be careful, {NICKNAME}... Even if the head of the Lotophagists has never shown their true identity before, we shouldn't trust this person so easily.

t_ch: 「引纬」方才没能探到她的气息，如果真是道幻影作成的假身，未免太过离奇。可如果是已逝之人，我应当能感觉出来才对……
t_en: The Weft could not detect her presence just now. That would be out of the ordinary if she were truly a phantom body. But if she is someone who has passed on, I should be able to tell...

t_ch: …我来验验她吧。
t_en: ...Let me test her.

t_ch: 两位，介意吾也加入这场密谈么？
t_en: Do you mind if I join your private conversation?

t_ch: 还是免了。连真身都不愿示现就想加入我们谈话，未免过于亲密了些。
t_en: That would be rather inappropriate for someone who isn't even willing to reveal their real self. Forget it.

t_ch: 不过，接下来我会向你提问，还请如实作答——如果你能对答如流，那我们便暂时当你不是敌人。
t_en: However, I'm going to ask you some questions. Please answer them truthfully. If you can do so without hesitation, we won't treat you as an enemy for the time being.

t_ch: 智力问答？也好，吾喜欢，请。
t_en: A pop quiz? Well, that sparks my interest. Go ahead.

t_ch: 第七百五十二届大辩论会决赛的议题是？
t_en: What was the topic for the grand finals of the <unbreak>752</unbreak>nd Great Debate?

t_ch: 「一支飞行的箭应在运动还是静止」。
t_en: "Is a flying arrow in motion or at rest?"

t_ch: 贵学派的代表是？
t_en: Who was your representative?

t_ch: 美狄亚，对阵「智种学派」的白厄。
t_en: Medea. She went up against Phainon of the Nousporists.

t_ch: 胜者是？
t_en: Who won?

t_ch: 无人获胜——因为那届大辩论会本就没召开过。
t_en: Nobody won because the <unbreak>752</unbreak>nd Great Debate never took place.

t_ch: 吾方才所述是上届赛况，胜者为白厄，此子并已蝉联足足十届辩论桂冠。另外，为打消汝疑虑，吾再附赠一道比那大辩论会更有用的讯息好了——
t_en: What I just mentioned happened during the previous debate. Phainon emerged victorious and obtained his tenth consecutive debate wreath. Also, to alleviate your worries, I shall provide you with a piece of information that's more valuable than the great debate...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「智种学派」的那刻夏尚未死灭，吾已将其救下，如今正在启蒙王座好生休养…</color>如何，可算满意否？
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Anaxa the Nousporist is still alive. I saved him, and he is now recuperating at the Luminary Throne...</color> So, are you satisfied with my answers?

t_ch: 呵呵，这瞠目结舌的模样…比方才可爱得愈教人欢喜了。
t_en: Hehe, this dumbfounded expression of yours... is much more adorable and likeable than the previous one.

t_ch: 常言道：「百闻不如一见」。两位随吾来，一道去那王座上瞧瞧便是。
t_en: As the saying goes, "Seeing is believing." Why don't you follow me to the throne and take a look for yourself.

t_ch: …我会时刻盯着你的。
t_en: ...I'll keep my eyes on you at all times.

t_ch: 喔，不胜荣幸。
t_en: Oh, that's truly an honor.

t_ch: 嗯…这就…谈拢了？
t_en: Hm... With that... the discussion is over?

t_ch: 一轮巨大的水车。看似能转，实际上也能转。眼下若水车能转将绝杀，可惜暂时转不得。
t_en: A giant waterwheel. It looks like it can turn, and it can actually turn. If the waterwheel could turn right now, it would be a sure win. It's a pity that it can't be turned for the time being.

t_ch: 答案是「水」——没有水，水车便无法旋转。
t_en: The answer is "water" — without it, the waterwheel cannot turn.

t_ch: 怎地忽怔住了？还是说，汝有别的法子能教水车转起不成？
t_en: Why did you suddenly freeze? Do you have another way to make the water wheel turn?

t_ch: 不转不是开拓者。
t_en: Consider it done.

t_ch: 很简单，我让它转不就是了。
t_en: It's simple, I'll just have to turn it.

t_ch: 我做不到…
t_en: I can't do it...

t_ch: 也是喏…孤掌难鸣，量力而行吧。
t_en: Indeed... You can only do so much by yourself.

t_ch: 阁下…真的可以么？
t_en: Can you... really do it?

t_ch: 纯白的少女以一种微妙的神情直直盯着你，粉色的小动物大大的眼睛里有小小的疑惑，而那位幽灵般的女子似乎不打算睁眼。
t_en: The pure white girl gazed at you with a subtle expression, while the pink creature's large eyes held a hint of curiosity. And that ghostly woman appeared unwilling to open her eyes.

t_ch: 开弓没有回头箭，你决定尝试……
t_en: Once the bow is drawn, there's no turning back. You decide to proceed...

t_ch: 正常一点的办法。
t_en: Come up with a relatively normal idea.

t_ch: *正常*？天啊，太可惜了。
t_en: Normal? Gosh, what a pity.

t_ch: 那么，你双手平推，掌心抵在看似刮板、实为轿底的沉重石板下，猛地一推——
t_en: With both hands, you press against the heavy stone slab, resembling a scraper but actually the bottom of a sedan, and with a sudden push—

t_ch: 水车纹丝不动。
t_en: The waterwheel didn't even move an inch...

t_ch: 使出我的最大力气！
t_en: I'll use all of my strength!

t_ch: 你一脚向后推出，架好身子，将一肩沉下，另一边扛住石板。稳住身形后，你故技重施，将双掌搭在板下，随后猛一发力，意图将力量全部灌注于一肩两掌中——
t_en: You move one foot back, brace yourself, and lower one shoulder while supporting the slab with the other. Once steady, you repeat your technique, placing both palms beneath the slab. With a sudden surge of strength, you channel all your power into your shoulder and hands—

t_ch: <size=40>哼——哼啊——！</size>
t_en: <size=40>Haaa—Haaaaaah!</size>

t_ch: 粗重的呼吸是你决心的真实写照，感人至深，就连林间草木都应声簌簌作响。
t_en: Your heavy breathing is a testament to your determination, deeply moving, as even the forest leaves rustle in response.

t_ch: 那么，水车动了么？——没有，因为水车得有水才能动。真是太让人遗憾了。
t_en: Has the waterwheel moved? — No, because it needs water to turn. What a pity.

t_ch: 也是喏…孤掌难鸣，量力而行吧。
t_en: Indeed... You can only do so much by yourself.

t_ch: 看来确实行不通，算了。
t_en: Forget it. That doesn't seem like it's going to work.

t_ch: 也是喏…孤掌难鸣，量力而行吧。
t_en: Indeed... You can only do so much by yourself.

t_ch: 「开拓」一点的办法。
t_en: Come up with a trailblazing type of idea.

t_ch: 好胆识！那么，有多「开拓」？
t_en: Courageous! Then, how "Trailblazing"?

t_ch: 阿基维利，借我元气！
t_en: Akivili, lend me your strength!

t_ch: 「开拓」，是「开拓」！你记得自己每每陷入困难时，只要心怀「开拓」便总能逢凶化吉——你们甚至还用它撞落过险些新生的星神，一轮小小水车何足挂齿？
t_en: "Trailblaze," it's "Trailblaze!" You remember whenever in trouble, keeping "Trailblaze" in mind has always guided you through adversity. You once even toppled an almost nascent Aeon with it. A mere waterwheel is trivial by comparison.

t_ch: 没错，正是「开拓」，唯有「开拓」。你气沉丹田，微微颔首，合上双眼，一时间如老僧入定。在你眼前的并非一片漆黑，而是万千银河如画卷般徐徐展开……
t_en: Indeed, it is "Trailblaze," and only "Trailblaze." You center your breath, nod slightly, and close your eyes, entering a state of deep meditation. Before you is not darkness, but a vast tapestry of countless galaxies unfurls like a scroll...

t_ch: 在那漫天繁星中，一道声音，一道来自过去的声音直刺入你的脑海：「无名客，就照你的意思去做吧！」——那是谁？原来（疑似）是阿基维利，列车永远的航标！
t_en: Amidst the vast expanse of stars, a voice, a voice from the past pierces your mind: "Nameless, do as you intend!" — Who could it be? It is (seemingly) Akivili, the eternal beacon of the Express!

t_ch: 「九十九万九千九百匹『开拓』之力！无名客，我们联合！」你（疑似）与已陨星神合而为一，「开拓」之力便立即暴增！狂增！劲增！无比霸念，无比狂态……
t_en: "<unbreak>999,900</unbreak> layers of Trailblaze power! Nameless, we unite!" You (seemingly) merged with the fallen Aeon as one, and then the Trailblaze power immediately surged! Rise! Leap! Such dominance and such ferocity...

t_ch: 如此「开拓」之开拓者，天下间便还有什么可以抵挡你了？他宝贝的，天下间便还有什么可以抵挡你，更何况一座连动都不能动的水车？！你猛睁开眼，便狂啸一声——
t_en: As such a "Trailblazing" Trailblazer, what in the world could possibly stand in your way? Son of a fudge, nothing can stop you, let alone an immobile waterwheel! You snap your eyes open and let out a fierce roar—

t_ch: <size=40>吔——！</size>
t_en: <size=40>Haaa!</size>

t_ch: 你将（疑似）在体内飞速运转的「开拓」之力倾泻而出。那么，水车动了么？
t_en: You unleash the (presumably) surging force of Trailblaze within you. So, has the waterwheel begun to turn?

t_ch: ——没有，因为水车得有水才能动。真是太让人遗憾了。
t_en: — No, because it needs water to turn. What a pity.

t_ch: 银河幻影究极超绝大口径全垒打！
t_en: Ultimate Extreme Galactic Phantom Heavy Caliber Home Run!

t_ch: 没错，就该这么打——不对，应该说只能这么打！摧毁一切障碍，「毁灭」与「开拓」交织正是你的美学，也是你身为银河球棒侠、身为《开拓豪侠传》主角的理由！
t_en: Exactly, this is how it should be done — no, how it can only be done! To destroy all obstacles... It's your art where "Destruction" and "Trailblaze" intertwine. This is the reason you are the Galactic Baseballer and the protagonist of Legend of the Trailblazer!

t_ch: 值此水车不能转之关键时刻，{NICKNAME}大喝一声：
t_en: At this critical moment when the waterwheel refused to turn, {NICKNAME} shouted:

t_ch: <size=36>银河幻影究极超绝大口径全垒打！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Ultimate Extreme Galactic Phantom Heavy Caliber Home Run!</size>

t_ch: 犹如天雷贯地，「毁灭」金光直欲撕裂黎明机器，摧坼穹窿。一时间，翁法罗斯无数洞天里，众人只觉天地翻覆、山河动荡。真可谓帝弓再临射星矢，灵木摧折云埃起……
t_en: Like a celestial thunderbolt piercing the earth, the "Destruction" radiance threatened to tear apart the Dawn Device, shattering the firmament. In an instant, within the many delves of Amphoreus, everyone felt the world overturn and the mountains and rivers tremble. It was as if the imperial bow had returned to shoot the stars, splintering sacred trees and raising clouds of dust...

t_ch: …咳咳，不对，串台了，这里是翁法罗斯，不是《开拓豪侠传》。那么，水车动了么？
t_en: Oops, wrong channel, this is Amphoreus, not the Legend of the Trailblazer. So, did the waterwheel move?

t_ch: ——没有，因为水车得有水才能动。真是太让人遗憾了。
t_en: — No, because it needs water to turn. What a pity.

t_ch: 承认自己只想开个玩笑。
t_en: Admit that you were only joking.

t_ch: 一言既出，驷马难追。要是用悬锋人的口头禅来说，那就是：开拓者的字典里绝没有「玩笑」二字。
t_en: Once spoken, words are irrevocable. As the Kremnoans would often say, "the word 'joke' does not exist in the Trailblazer's dictionary."

t_ch: 以防你良心受到谴责，还是再好好想想吧。别让你的伙伴失望！
t_en: To avoid a guilty conscience, think it over carefully. Don't let your partners down!

t_ch: 求求你，别笑了…
t_en: Please, stop laughing...

t_ch: …我没有。
t_en: ...I'm not.

t_ch: 她有，但是好伙伴，我忍住了！
t_en: She's laughing. But I managed to hold it in!

t_ch: 虽然败了…但必可活用于下次。
t_en: Although it failed... I'm sure I can put it to good use next time.

t_ch: 真是看到了…珍奇无比的场面。
t_en: Truly a rare sight to behold.

t_ch: 这也是一道无比珍贵的记忆呀。
t_en: This is indeed an incredibly precious memory.

t_ch: 这颗心脏是树庭一切水流之源……
t_en: This heart is the source of all water in the Grove...

t_ch: 正是。新灵感的火花每每在树庭中迸发，露水便会自此垂落，落入池中。
t_en: Indeed. When the sparks of inspiration burst forth within the Grove, dewdrops fall and land within the pool.

t_ch: 那我来努力开动脑筋…呣呣呣…
t_en: Then let me ignite my creativity... Ummmm...

t_ch: 你屏息凝神。嘀嗒！一滴水落入池中。
t_en: You hold your breath and focus. Drip drip! A drop of water falls into the pool.

t_ch: 欸…难道说真的能行么？
t_en: Huh... Can that really work?

t_ch: …不，那只是普通的一滴露水，遵循水的三态变化之规律，而非因灵感而生。
t_en: ...No, it was merely an ordinary drop of dew, following the natural laws of water's three states, not born of inspiration.

t_ch: 看来只凭我们几个是没法灌满它了……
t_en: It seems like it won't be possible to fill it up with just the few of us...

t_ch: 其实我带了「固态净水」。
t_en: Actually, I have some Solid Water.

t_ch: 你置入一枚固态净水，很快融化得无影无踪。
t_en: You placed a piece of solid water, and it quickly dissolved without a trace.

t_ch: 杯水车薪。但你想要救活这颗大树的期盼是如此热烈，以至于不知何种存在从遥远多元宇宙深处向你投来赞许的目光。
t_en: A futile effort. Yet your fervent hope to revive this great tree was so intense that some presence from the distant multiverse cast an approving gaze upon you.

t_ch: 看来只凭我们几个是没法灌满它了……
t_en: It seems like it won't be possible to fill it up with just the few of us...

t_ch: 呵…还是随吾一道来吧。
t_en: Heh... Just come with me.

t_ch: 要想唤醒它，得先去取来一样「宝物」才行哪。
t_en: We must first retrieve a treasure if we want to awaken the heart.

t_ch: 吾之所想，一见了然——
t_en: My intentions should be obvious...

t_ch: 瞧见那边厢的浅塘了么？那水间生着睡莲，乃是{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}最初挥泪浇灌，并以{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}携来「友亲之爱」呵护成的，两位尊神永世相伴之信物。
t_en: See that shallow pond over there? Water lilies grow there. Initially, {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} watered them with their tears while Mnestia nurtured them with affectionate love. They are a token of the eternal companionship between the two gods.

t_ch: 且请二人越过深井，为吾采来那<color=#dbc291ff>「金枝誓言」</color>，便就够了。
t_en: All the two of you have to do is to cross the deep well and retrieve the <color=#dbc291ff>Golden Bough of Vows</color> for me.

t_ch: …小卡，你说话也太难懂了。总而言之，就是要我们把那朵花取来嘛？
t_en: ...Cal, you're making things sound too complicated. All you want us to do is to retrieve the flower, right?

t_ch: 你就拿这个考验我无名客？
t_en: Is this how you're going to test a Nameless?

t_ch: 正是。莫非汝不知怎生是好了？
t_en: Indeed. Could it be that you actually do not know how to proceed?

t_ch: 这深井不会是陷阱吧…
t_en: Could the deep well be a trap...?

t_ch: 呵呵，怎说得这样不吉利话哪。
t_en: Heh, you're making it sound so ominous.

t_ch: 取来可以，但劝你别费心思打别的算盘。
t_en: We can retrieve it, but I advise you not to waste your time on any schemes.

t_ch: 啊呀，只道是吾为汝等排了忧、释了难，却得不着报应么？
t_en: Oh my, I'm helping you to eliminate your worries and obstacles, and yet I receive nothing in return?

t_ch: 况且，此物也是唤醒那心脏、引出水源的紧要物事。倘若今番寻不来，你我便就困驻此地，永世逃将不得了哪。
t_en: Besides, the bough is essential for awakening the heart and drawing water out of the source. If you can't find it this time, we can just remain trapped here for the rest of eternity.

t_ch: 什么意思，你是要缠上我们，把我们永远关在这里嘛？
t_en: What's that supposed to mean!? Are you planning to keep us here forever?

t_ch: 呵呵，哪里的话。一根绳上，两只蚂蚱罢了。
t_en: Heh, you're overthinking things. We're all in the same boat.

t_ch: 不过，要说吾没甚二心，那确是胡搅蛮缠了。嗯，倒不如接住这话头交代了好——
t_en: Although, it would be absurd to say that I have no other motives. Since you've brought it up, I might as well take this chance to explain...

t_ch: 眼下，吾仅想借此机会，验验汝二人成色如何。怎样，足够真诚了么？
t_en: I'm simply making use of this opportunity to see what you two are made of. So, is that truthful enough for you?

t_ch: 「验验成色」…这种理由也太直接了吧。
t_en: See what we're made of... Could you have phrased that any more directly?

t_ch: 多的暂且不便多说。言至于此，去罢？
t_en: Now is not the time for me to elaborate further. So, please proceed?

t_ch: 身为那刻夏的门生，「等价交换」应是寻常不过的道理了哪。
t_en: As a student of Anaxa, "equivalent exchange" should be something that you are familiar with.

t_ch: …无法反驳。
t_en: ...I cannot deny that.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，眼下我们利益一致，还是先依她指示行事吧。况且，她知道我的过去…虽然不便展开，但她有理由忌惮我。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, since our interests are aligned right now, it's better for us to do as she says. Besides, she knows about my past... Even though I'm not able to elaborate much, I can tell you that she has reasons to fear me.

t_ch: 如果她最终的目标不幸是阁下…请放心，我会及时出手的。
t_en: If you unfortunately turn out to be her ultimate target... Please don't worry. I will promptly intervene.

t_ch: 有蝶在，好让人放心呀。那人家也得开动脑筋——
t_en: It's so reassuring to have Cas around. I should put my brain to use too, then.

t_ch: 这就是「金枝誓言」……
t_en: So, this is the Golden Bough of Vows...

t_ch: …希望泰坦不会迁怒于我们。
t_en: ...I hope that the Titan will not take their anger out on us.

t_ch: 原来我们这是在泰坦头上动土…
t_en: So, what we're doing is simply provoking the Titans...

t_ch: 没事，有好几个星神给我撑腰。
t_en: Don't worry. There are several Aeons that have my back.

t_ch: …要是祂们也能干涉泰坦的事务就好了。
t_en: ...If only THEY could interfere in the affairs of the Titans.

t_ch: 呵，美轮美奂，熠熠生辉…果真似当年。
t_en: Heh, so lustrous and beautiful... It's even more magnificent than before.

t_ch: 呀？！小卡，人家的心脏本来就小小一颗，你别突然冒出来吓人家好不好…这都第二次了！
t_en: Hey, Cal!? Don't suddenly appear out of nowhere and scare me like that! My tiny little heart cannot take it... This is already the second time!

t_ch: 知道了。抱歉呢，粉色的小兔子。
t_en: Understood. My apologies, pink bunny.

t_ch: 这回又是「粉色小兔子」了吗？人家的物种还真是包容万象呢……
t_en: It's pink bunny this time? I'm truly an all-encompassing species...

t_ch: 这…真的是传说中的「金枝誓言」么？
t_en: Is... this the legendary Golden Bough of Vows?

t_ch: 呵呵，一试便知。
t_en: Hehe, we'll know once we test it.

t_ch: 到了。烦请为吾撷取一枚花瓣，置于池中。
t_en: We're here. Could you kindly pluck a petal for me and place it into the pool?

t_ch: （取下「金枝誓言」的一瓣。）
t_en: (Remove a petal from the Golden Bough of Vows.)

t_ch: 接下来，小女神，请汝再演绎一遍那个吧。
t_en: Now, can our little goddess perform that again?

t_ch: 啊？
t_en: Huh?

t_ch: 就那个——{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}祭司的誓词。
t_en: That being the oath of {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}'s priests.

t_ch: 好，知道了……
t_en: Right, got it...

t_ch: 「{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}呵！以『引纬』封证誓约，我向你求愿——愿你的金丝与爱缠绕我身！」
t_en: "O {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}! With the Weft as my vow, I beseech you: Entwine my body with your golden thread and affection!"

t_ch: 喔…真的亮了！
t_en: Oh... It really lit up!

t_ch: 这是什么原理？
t_en: What is the principle behind this?

t_ch: 好耀眼…
t_en: How dazzling...

t_ch: 不过是…呵，泰坦与人子们陈旧的约定罢了。
t_en: Heh, it's just... an ancient promise between the Titan and humans.

t_ch: 如何？这确是真正的「金枝誓言」——两位也并未遭吾暗算吧？
t_en: So, what do you think? It really is the Golden Bough of Vows, and I did not set any traps for you, right?

t_ch: 这话…诚然不假。
t_en: That is... indeed true.

t_ch: 呵呵，可汝这神情，却依旧像条挨了鞭笞的犬崽呢。即便这确是吾欲擒故纵的把戏，眼下汝等也只得束手就困，不是么？
t_en: Haha, you look like a sad lost puppy. Even if this is indeed a scheme to get you to lower your guard, you don't have any other choice but to play along, do you?

t_ch: 依吾所见，倒不如宽下心来，合衷共济，先踏过难关，再论谁是谁非。
t_en: Therefore, why don't we just put everything aside and work together? We can always determine who's right and who's wrong once we overcome this.

t_ch: 嗯…我同意。
t_en: Yes... I agree.

t_ch: 甚好。那么，吾等就登上水车……
t_en: Great. Then, let's ride the water wheel...

t_ch: 但藏头露尾可不是谈合作该有的态度。
t_en: However, giving us half-truths is not the right attitude for cooperation.

t_ch: 况且，依「等价交换」的原理：既然我们通过了你所谓的考验，你也该把用意一五一十地交代出来了。
t_en: Furthermore, according to the principle of "equivalent exchange," since we have passed your so-called trial, isn't it time for you to make your intentions clear to us?

t_ch: 啊呀，这委屈的小模样真教人目不忍视。虽然方才不过一道考验而已…但吾甘心破例一次，并当坦诚相待。
t_en: Ahh, I really can't bear to look at your sad expressions. Although you only cleared a simple trial... I'm willing to make an exception and treat you with sincerity.

t_ch: 一人一个问题…啊，那小兔子不算在内。问罢。
t_en: I'll allow each of you to ask a question... Ah, but not the little bunny. So, ask away.

t_ch: 怎么区别对待呀，是怕人家太聪明，问出颠覆整个翁法罗斯的问题吗？
t_en: What's with this unfair treatment? Is it because I'm too smart and you're afraid that the question I ask will turn Amphoreus upside down?

t_ch: 嗯…那么，{NICKNAME}阁下，你先请吧。
t_en: Well... In that case, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, please go ahead.

t_ch: 你的真实身份是？
t_en: What is your true identity?
Hm...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>方才已告说过了，吾乃神悟树庭七贤人之一。若觉着这答案不够利落，再附赠一条：吾实为七贤人之首。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>As I've previously mentioned, I'm one of the Seven Sages of the Grove of Epiphany. If you think that this answer is insufficient, then I'll add to it. I'm the leader of the Seven Sages.</color>

t_ch: 你为什么不以真面目示人？
t_en: Why don't you show your true appearance?

t_ch: 嗯…这倒是个不错的问题。
t_en: Mmm... A good question.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>不是不愿，而是不能。而要吾以正身示人，还需汝等鼎力相助。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>It's an inability to do so rather than an unwillingness. For me to appear in my true form, I'll require your help.</color>

t_ch: 你考验我们的目的是？
t_en: What is your purpose in testing us?

t_ch: 嗯…这倒是个不错的问题。
t_en: Mmm... A good question.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>吾想确认汝等是否有实力，为吾夺回正身…更从黑潮手中夺回树庭。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>I want to ascertain your ability to help me reclaim my true form... and reclaim the Grove from the black tide.</color>

t_ch: 为什么说我们与你利害攸关？
t_en: Why do you say that our fates are intertwined?

t_ch: 嗯…竟能一下切中要害呢。
t_en: Oh... Straight to the point.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>因着黑潮，泰坦在此地布下天罗地网。若想逃出生天，还需汝等为吾夺回正身才行。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The Titans have cast a net over this place because of the black tide. If we want to escape, I'll require your help to reclaim my true form.</color>

t_ch: 啊？我先？为什么？
t_en: Ahh? Me first? But why?

t_ch: 不好…这可算两个问题喏。
t_en: That's no good... You asked two questions.

t_ch: …卡吕普索阁下，还请别玩这种文字游戏。
t_en: ...Let's not get into a game of semantics, Lady Calypso.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，我会根据你的提问观察她的反应，以便判断她回答是真是假。
t_en: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, I will observe her reaction based on your question to determine whether she is being truthful.

t_ch: 所以，不必顾虑，随意提问就好。
t_en: So, don't worry about it. Go ahead and ask your question.

t_ch: 喏，小小的「死亡」女神，轮到你了。
t_en: Well, it's your turn now, little goddess of Death.

t_ch: 试问：你方才的回答是否字字属实，毫无隐瞒？
t_en: My question is: Was your previous answer the whole truth and nothing but the truth?

t_ch: 故弄玄虚可没有意义哪。
t_en: There's no point in making this unnecessarily complicated.

t_ch: 这句话我原样奉还。但我们并无敌意，一切只为了自己免遭潜在的恶意伤害。
t_en: That applies to you as well. However, we do not harbor any hostility. We merely want to avoid any potential harm to us.

t_ch: 为了更好地合作，卡吕普索阁下，还是正面回答我的问题为好。
t_en: Lady Calypso, if you want us to work together more effectively, I advise you to answer my question honestly.

t_ch: 呵呵…好。吾方才回答字字属实，不打诳语，过去与未来亦是。
t_en: Hehe... Alright. I was completely truthful in my response just now. I have not deceived you, nor will I.

t_ch: 恕我冒昧，剪接事实可也算是谎言。
t_en: With all due respect, omitting facts can also be considered deceit.

t_ch: 是吗？即便如此，吾也不会更改方才的回答哟？
t_en: Is that so? Regardless, I still stand by my previous response.

t_ch: …那就请带路吧。「事实胜于雄辩」——等到启蒙王座，谁是谁非自然不攻自破。
t_en: ...Then, please lead the way. After all, facts speak for themselves. The truth will come to light once we arrive at the Luminary Throne.

t_ch: 好，好。本以为你是那{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}「灰黯之手」{RUBY_E#}在人间播下的花蕾…现在看来倒像朵气鼓鼓的毒蕈了。
t_en: Alright, alright. I originally thought that you were just a beautiful flower planted in the mortal realm by the {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Hand of Shadow{RUBY_E#}... But now, I see you have some prickly thorns too.

t_ch: 就当阁下这是在夸我好了。
t_en: I'll just consider that a compliment.

t_ch: 正是，吾在称赞你憨态可掬呢。
t_en: Indeed, I'm complimenting your charming naiveté.

t_ch: 哇，小小灰、小小蝶，还有粉色小狗！
t_en: Woah, it's Little Gray, Little Cas, and the pink puppy!

t_ch: 我…哎，算了，小狗就小狗，包容——包容！
t_en: I... Forget it. I'll just be a puppy. Be forgiving... Be forgiving!

t_ch: 缇安大人！还好吗，没有受伤吧？
t_en: Lady Trianne! Are you alright? Were you hurt?

t_ch: 没有，缇安飞得高高的，怪物根本够不到缇安。
t_en: No, Trianne flew high up into the air so the monsters couldn't reach us.

t_ch: 没受伤就好。
t_en: All that matters is you're alright.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，不仅如此：阿雅给的纺锤好厉害，缇安好像找到小那刻夏啦——
t_en: Heh heh, also, the spindle that Agy gave us is so powerful that Trianne seems to have found Nax...

t_ch: 找到那刻夏了吗？
t_en: Did you find Anaxa?

t_ch: 嗯！阿雅给的纺锤好厉害，缇安好像找到小那刻夏啦——
t_en: Yup! The spindle that Agy gave us is so powerful that Trianne seems to have found Nax...

t_ch: 制空权已确保！
t_en: Air supremacy secured!

t_ch: 「制空权已确保！」…好帅，但这是什么意思？
t_en: "Air supremacy secured!" ...That sounds so cool! But what does it mean?

t_ch: 不过，言归正传！阿雅给的纺锤好厉害，缇安好像找到小那刻夏啦——
t_en: Wait a minute, let's get back on track! The spindle that Agy gave us is so powerful that Trianne seems to have found Nax...

t_ch: ——他就在树冠附近！虽然感应很微弱，但和刚才的仙女木们不一样。
t_en: He's near the treetop! Even though our perception of him is very weak, it's not like the White Dryads from before.

t_ch: 不过，缇安因为是一个人，怕危险，没有飞下去看。
t_en: But, since Trianne was alone and afraid that it might be dangerous, we did not fly there to take a look.

t_ch: 看来缇安大人有好好记得我们的约定。
t_en: It seems like Lady Trianne did not forget our promise.

t_ch: 那刻夏老师也确实还活着，并且就在启蒙王座…至少这件事上，卡吕普索阁下并没有说谎。
t_en: Anaxa is indeed still alive, and he's at the Luminary Throne right now... It seems like Lady Calypso did not lie regarding this.

t_ch: 咦？咔吕噗嗦…是谁呀？
t_en: Hm? Kalipso... Who's that?

t_ch: 似乎是「莲食学派」的所有者。
t_en: She seems to be the head of the Lotophagists.

t_ch: 唔，原来大家找到幸存者啦！不过，金丝似乎一直没感应到你们说的人呢。
t_en: Oh, so you found a survivor! But the golden thread doesn't seem to be able to sense the person you're talking about.

t_ch: 一位路过的迷之好心人。
t_en: A kind-hearted and mysterious passer-by.

t_ch: 唔，原来大家遇到好心人帮忙啦！不过，金丝似乎一直没感应到你们说的人呢。
t_en: Oh, so you received help from a kind-hearted person! But the golden thread doesn't seem to be able to sense the person you're talking about.

t_ch: 一个在树庭游荡的…幽灵？
t_en: A spirit... wandering around the Grove?

t_ch: 呜哇，幽灵…缇安好想见识一下，连金丝都感应不到的幽灵！
t_en: Whoa! A spirit... Trianne wants to meet this spirit that even the gold thread can't sense!

t_ch: 小卡，来认识一下我们的另一位同伴吧！
t_en: Cal, come and meet our other companion!

t_ch: 嗯？她去哪儿了……
t_en: Hm? Where did she go off to...

t_ch: 来无影去无踪啊…真是个怪人。
t_en: Coming and going without a trace... She's such a strange person.

t_ch: 唔，其实缇安还找到了这个——会不会和你们说的那个人有关系呀？
t_en: Oh, actually, Trianne also found this. Could this be related to the person you're talking about?

t_ch: 这是…一片烧焦的布料么？
t_en: This is... a piece of burnt cloth?

t_ch: 嗯！缇安不久前在一根树枝上找到的。缇安还顺着用金丝找了找，发现整个树庭到处都有类似的气息。
t_en: Yup! Trianne found it on a branch not long ago. Trianne even used the golden thread to search around and found that the entire Grove is giving off a similar aura.

t_ch: 可能是…那位那刻夏用「炼金术」留下的，想教我们做事？
t_en: Maybe... Anaxa left it behind using alchemy, in order to guide us?

t_ch: 缇安觉得不是。因为缇安捡到的时候，什么也没看到…而且从金线看，那个气息像是在跑来跑去！
t_en: Trianne doesn't think so. Because when Trianne picked it up, we didn't see anything at all... And judging by the golden thread, the aura seems to be all around!

t_ch: …缇安大人，现在这道气息的位置在？
t_en: ...Lady Trianne, where is the aura gathered at right now?
Mmm...

t_ch: 好像…就在高一点的地方，我们前面不远处。
t_en: It seems to be... a little higher and a little ahead of us.

t_ch: 「献身拱心」……
t_en: The Dome of Devotion...

t_ch: 难以置信。是为了抵御黑潮，还是……
t_en: That can't be. Was it for fending off the black tide, or perhaps...

t_ch: 这个「绅士之蝶」，到底是什么呀？是很厉害的守关怪物吗？
t_en: What exactly is this "Butterfly of the Vine Mine"? Is it a very powerful guardian monster?

t_ch: 不，怎么说呢…算是泰坦火种的一道保险吧。这只蝴蝶由{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}残存的神识幻化而成，肩负着守卫火种的职责。
t_en: No, how should I put it... It's considered a safeguard for the Titan's Coreflame. This butterfly is created from {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}'s remaining divine mind and bears the responsibility of guarding the Coreflame.

t_ch: 据说，只有向其证明心中存有「纯粹无私之爱」，才能通过蝴蝶的考验，唤醒大树开道，觐见{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: Legend has it that someone can only pass the trial of the butterfly by proving they possess pure and unselfish love within their heart. Only then can they awaken the Great Tree to open up the path to meet {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 那我们…要怎么证明？
t_en: But how are we... going to prove it?

t_ch: 对泰坦说「我爱你」就可以吗？那迷迷很擅长哦！
t_en: Will telling the Titan "I love you" work? Mem is good at doing that!

t_ch: 抱歉，我也不知道…毕竟这可是整个树庭、乃至翁法罗斯，都只有极少数人知晓的秘中之秘。
t_en: Sorry, but even I don't know how... After all, this is a secret among secrets that only a select few in the entire Grove and even Amphoreus know.

t_ch: 比起这个——缇安大人，金线有对周围产生任何反应么？
t_en: Rather than worry about this, Lady Trianne, did the golden thread react to anything around here?

t_ch: 唔，没有。那个不知道是什么的东西，好像还在更前面，更上面。
t_en: Umm, no. That unknown thing seems to be even farther ahead and higher up.

t_ch: 啊这…可前方是死路呀？
t_en: Uhhh, but... Isn't that a dead end up ahead?

t_ch: 也许，我们可以再试试看…消散的蝴蝶，会不会再对「金枝誓言」产生反应？
t_en: Perhaps we can try again... Let's see if the butterfly will still react to the Golden Bough of Vows despite having dissipated.

t_ch: 如果真是神话中的信物，理应会有效果。
t_en: If it's indeed the token mentioned in the legends, there should be a reaction.

t_ch: 取下一瓣「金枝誓言」
t_en: Take petal from Golden Bough of Vows

t_ch: 你将「金枝誓言」一瓣取下，双手呈上。
t_en: You take a single petal from the Golden Bough of Vows and offer it with both hands.

t_ch: 蝴蝶纹丝不动。
t_en: The butterfly didn't even move one inch.

t_ch: 再坚持一会儿，心诚则灵。
t_en: Just hang on a little longer, a sincere heart will prevail.

t_ch: 即便是翁法罗斯本土神话，也不外乎「心诚则灵」四个字。只要你能展现出诚意，蝴蝶便绝不会无动于衷……
t_en: Even in the native myths of Amphoreus, it all boils down to "sincerity brings miracles." Show genuine intent, and the butterfly will surely respond...

t_ch: …很遗憾，看起来它就是无动于衷。
t_en: ...Yet, regrettably, it remains unmoved.

t_ch: 拿起花瓣在蝴蝶面前晃晃。
t_en: Pick up the petal and wave it in front of the butterfly.

t_ch: 凭借你与小动物打交道的诸多经验，你坚信蝴蝶决不会无动于衷——除非它能忍住。
t_en: With your extensive experience in dealing with little creatures, you are certain the butterfly will not ignore you—unless it can resist the urge.

t_ch: …很遗憾，看起来它确实忍住了。
t_en: ...Alas, it seems it has indeed resisted the urge.

t_ch: 以极其挑衅的表情嚼嚼花瓣。
t_en: Chew on the petal with a highly provocative expression.

t_ch: 以你对人类社会普遍水准的理解，争强好胜是生命的天性——蝴蝶定当也不例外——而掠夺共同的猎物必定能唤醒这种深藏于基因中的原始本能。
t_en: Understanding the common nature of human society, you believe that the drive to compete is an innate instinct of all living beings — surely the butterfly is no exception — and that vying for shared prey should awaken this primal urge deeply embedded in its genes.

t_ch: …很遗憾，看起来它拒绝了你的决斗邀请。
t_en: ...Alas, it seems to have declined your challenge for a duel.

t_ch: 我尽力了，蝴蝶纹丝不动。
t_en: I did what I could, but the butterfly didn't even move an inch.

t_ch: 是不是还得用什么妙妙咒语？
t_en: Do we also have to use some kind of special spell?

t_ch: …我也来试试看。
t_en: ...Let me give it a try.

t_ch: 「{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}呵！以『引纬』封证誓约，我向你求愿——愿你的金丝与爱缠绕我身！」
t_en: "O {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}! With the Weft as my vow, I beseech you: Entwine my body with your golden thread and affection!"

t_ch: …蝴蝶依旧纹丝不动。
t_en: The butterfly still didn't move one inch.

t_ch: <size=36>呼哇——！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Waaaah!</size>

t_ch: 缇安大人？…等等，还有迷迷，她们俩跑哪去了？
t_en: Lady Trianne? ...And even Mem? Where have they disappeared to?

t_ch: <size=36>小小灰，小小蝶——快来看——！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Little Gray, Little Cas... Look over here... Quick!</size>

t_ch: <size=36>小小咪——要燃起来了——！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Memmy... is about to burst into flames!</size>

t_ch: 呼哇…小小灰，小小蝶！出事了，出大事了！
t_en: Waaaah... Little Gray, Little Cas! It's bad... It's very bad!

t_ch: 没事…好伙伴，人家没事…！只是人家的身子…稍微有点点烫…！
t_en: Don't worry, friend... I'm fine...! I just feel... a little warm...!

t_ch: 不过…你们要是别让人家变成这些小东西嘴里的点心，就更好了…！
t_en: But... It would be best if you could keep me from becoming a snack for these little things...!

t_ch: 对不起，人家不该说你们是小东西…！
t_en: Sorry, I shouldn't have called you guys "little things"...!

t_ch: 别慌，我们马上来救你！
t_en: Calm down, we'll be right there!

t_ch: 既然如此，那我们先撤了。
t_en: If that's the case, let's get out of here.

t_ch: 缇安大人，到底发生什么了？
t_en: Lady Trianne, what exactly happened just now?

t_ch: 缇安和小小咪，想在附近看看，有没有机关什么的……
t_en: Trianne and Memmy were looking around to see if there were any mechanisms nearby...

t_ch: 结果，它看到了那块大琥珀，刚想看看，就被大家包围了！
t_en: But just as they went to take a closer look at that big piece of amber, they were surrounded!

t_ch: …我知道了。
t_en: ...I see.

t_ch: 动身吧，阁下。附近有{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}祭司的宝珠…但愿可堪一用。
t_en: Let's get a move on. The orbs belonging to {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s priests should be nearby... Hopefully, they'll be of some use.

t_ch: 那就…拜托大家了…！
t_en: I'll... leave it in your capable hands...!

t_ch: 趁还没熟透…人家先想想该怎么谢罪…呜呜……
t_en: Before I'm cooked... let me first think about how to apologize... *sniffle*

t_ch: 终于来了，伙伴！等你们很久了……
t_en: You're finally here, friend! I've been waiting for a while now...

t_ch: 我们，包夹它们吧！一起让这些不懂得怜香惜玉的家伙，尝尝人家滚烫的致命引力！
t_en: Let's surround them! It's time to give this bunch of ungentlemanly fools a taste of my fiery and fatal allure!

t_ch: 精准而优雅，简直不费吹灰之力…这也算得上是挑战嘛？
t_en: Precision, and grace. That did not take much effort... Was this supposed to be a challenge?

t_ch: …开个玩笑！人家只是想感叹一下，{NICKNAME}和小蝶两人每次面对危机都能轻松化解呢。
t_en: ...Just kidding! I just wanted to marvel at how {NICKNAME} and Cas always manage to resolve crises so effortlessly.

t_ch: 一般一般，世界第三。
t_en: I'm just so-so, only third best, ya know?

t_ch: 太谦虚啦好伙伴！那人家就勉为其难当第二，小蝶当第一吧。
t_en: Friend, you're too humble! In that case, I'll just have to settle for being second best while Cas can be the best.

t_ch: 其实我上了四个人。
t_en: Actually, there's four of us.

t_ch: 哦，对！对不起，忘记小缇安了。
t_en: Oh, right! Sorry, I forgot about Trianne.

t_ch: 没关系！缇安，刚刚才飞下来来着。
t_en: It's all right! Trianne only just flew down.

t_ch: 大家没事就好。言归正传，这枚琥珀是…？
t_en: I'm glad that everyone is alright. Speaking of which, this piece of amber is...?

t_ch: …是{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}火种的残渣喔。
t_en: ...A remnant of {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame.

t_ch: 只要诸位以「金枝誓言」采撷眼前余火，献与神蝶，便能前去树冠的王座了。
t_en: To get to the throne at the treetop, gather the embers before you with the Golden Bough of Vows and present it to the divine butterfly.

t_ch: 呜哇…你是从哪里冒出来的？！
t_en: Whoa... Where did you come from!?

t_ch: 终于出现了…卡吕普索阁下。
t_en: You finally appeared... Lady Calypso.

t_ch: 嗯…是有段时间没见面了哪。方才那场战斗十足酣畅，吾心中实在欢喜……
t_en: Yes... It's been some time. The battle just now was a true delight, and I feel quite elated...

t_ch: …看来果真能倚仗诸位，夺回吾之正身了。
t_en: ...It seems like I'll really be able to rely on all of you to reclaim my true form.

t_ch: …缇安大人，金线对她有反应么？
t_en: ...Lady Trianne, how does the golden thread react to her?
Mmm...

t_ch: 没有…一点都没有。
t_en: There's... no reaction at all.

t_ch: 呵呵，当然了。毕竟汝等方才拾得的残片，与吾没有分毫干系。
t_en: Hehe, obviously. After all, the fragment that you picked up just now is completely unrelated to me.

t_ch: 好了，速速照吾说的做便是——倘若诸位足以通过这道考验，吾便将真相如实相告吧。
t_en: Alright, just do as I say. If you're able to pass the trial, I will tell you everything truthfully.

t_ch: 又是一道「考验」……
t_en: Another trial...

t_ch: 真是的，人家最讨厌说话说一半的家伙了！
t_en: Come on, I hate people who don't finish their thoughts!

t_ch: 但是，要找到小那刻夏，就得去到树冠吧？
t_en: But we have to go to the treetop to find Nax anyway, right?

t_ch: 我差不多有头绪了。走吧，取得余火，找到她当面对质。
t_en: I've got a hunch. Come, let's collect the embers and go confront her.

t_ch: 按照卡吕普索所说，我们须「以『金枝誓言』采撷眼前余火」么……
t_en: According to Calypso, we just have to "gather the embers before us with the Golden Bough of Vows"...

t_ch: 金色的睡莲甫一与琥珀相接，火光便自花瓣流溢而出。
t_en: As the golden water lily touches the amber, flames spill from its petals.

t_ch: 神奇的是，火焰并未吞噬整个花朵，仅有些微火星汇聚于瓣尖，隐隐燃烧。
t_en: Curiously, the fire does not consume the entire flower. Only faint sparks gather at the tips, subtly burning.

t_ch: 呵呵，看来诸位已采得余火了。
t_en: Hehe, it seems like you managed to gather the embers.

t_ch: 既已至此…就将其供奉神蝶罢。
t_en: In that case... just offer it to the divine butterfly.

t_ch: 没关系，阁下，就照她说的做吧。
t_en: It'll be fine. Let's just do as she says.

t_ch: （奉上隐隐燃烧的「金枝誓言」。）
t_en: (Offer the faintly burning Golden Bough of Vows.)

t_ch: 成功啦！道路长出来了——
t_en: It's a success! The path has appeared...

t_ch: 呵…诸位果真通过考验了啊。
t_en: Heh... All of you have indeed passed the trial.

t_ch: *泰坦悲伤的低鸣*
t_en: *Titan's sad cries*

t_ch: 嗯？蝴蝶的振翅声……
t_en: Hmm? The sound of a butterfly's wings...

t_ch: *泰坦悲伤的低鸣*
t_en: *Titan's sad cries*

t_ch: 吾去去就回。
t_en: I'll be back shortly.

t_ch: *泰坦悲伤的低鸣*
t_en: *Titan's sad cries*

t_ch: 当然，吾等早已有约定……
t_en: Of course, our promise still stands...

t_ch: 只是，现在…轮到吾献身了。
t_en: But now... It's time for me to sacrifice myself.

t_ch: *泰坦悲伤的低鸣*
t_en: *Titan's sad cries*
Hehe...

t_ch: 若西风有其尽头，吾等便在那重逢罢。
t_en: If the west wind ever ends, let that be the place where we reunite.

t_ch: 别了…吾爱。
t_en: Farewell... my love.

t_ch: 卡吕普索阁下，你这是……
t_en: Lady Calypso, this is...

t_ch: 呵呵…没什么。
t_en: Haha... It's nothing much.

t_ch: 感谢诸位相助——现在应由吾来履行约定了。
t_en: Thank you so much for your help. Now it's time for me to fulfill my part of the promise.

t_ch: 事已至此，就由我来起头好了……
t_en: Well, in that case, I can start...

t_ch: 您…其实正是{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>理性之泰坦</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>瑟希斯</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>本尊</color>吧？
t_en: You're... actually {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Reason Titan</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>Cerces</color>{RUBY_E#}, right?

t_ch: 什、什么情况？你？泰坦本尊？
t_en: Wh—What's going on? You're the Titan?

t_ch: 啊呀，人子们…终于通过最后一道考验了。
t_en: Oh my, the children of humanity... have passed the final trial at last.

t_ch: 吾还在想，汝等要到何时才打算揭穿吾呢。怎么发现的？
t_en: I was wondering when you were planning to expose me. How did you know?

t_ch: 谜题般的试炼、多疑却直诚的性格、称{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}为吾爱，还有……
t_en: The riddle-like trials, your distrustful-yet-sincere character, referring to {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#} as your love, and...

t_ch: 「莲食学派」的掌门人，其真名为美狄亚，而非卡吕普索。
t_en: The head of the Lotophagists is actually called Medea and not Calypso.

t_ch: 既然汝从初时起便明白吾并非其人，怎到了现在才戳穿？
t_en: Since you knew from the start that I was not who I said I was, why did you wait until now to expose me?

t_ch: 因为我不相信{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}竟会以人形行走在大地上，也担忧泰坦已遭黑潮挟制，恐将置我们于死地……
t_en: Because I did not believe that {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} would walk this world in a human form. I was also afraid that the Titans were under the control of the black tide and would do us harm...

t_ch: 还有，「出言必有据」——这正是我在树庭求学时习得的宝贵知识。
t_en: Also, "to make a claim, one must have evidence" — this is the precious knowledge that I acquired during my time at the Grove.

t_ch: 呵…甚好。吾等竟能于死境中取得如此生机，命运还真是深奥难解哪。
t_en: Heh... Excellent. To think we were able to gain a new chance at life in the midst of death — fate truly is a mysterious thing.

t_ch: 既然如此…也该告诉我们，您为何要大费周章，设下如此谜题了吧？
t_en: Well... Shouldn't you also tell us why you went through all the trouble of setting up these riddles?

t_ch: 唔，理由很简单哪？
t_en: Oh, the reason's quite simple.

t_ch: 吾需要帮助——可就像诸位对吾有所提防一样，吾也须确保，汝等并非妄图染指火种的恶徒，且有能耐对付近在眼前的威胁。
t_en: I needed your help, and just like how you were wary of me, I had to ensure that you were not villains who were trying to get their hands on the Coreflame. I also had to ascertain that you were capable of dealing with the threat at hand.

t_ch: 这「威胁」与黑潮有关？
t_en: Is this threat related to the black tide?

t_ch: 正是，更与方才那失物有关。其主人乃是沉默且多疑的猎手，似是自黑潮中脱胎，与黑潮一道袭来。
t_en: Indeed, and it's even more related to that lost item from before. Its owner is a quiet and paranoid hunter who seems to have been reborn from the black tide and is attacking along with it.

t_ch: 吾实在奈何他不得，只得裂身而逃，以免戕害，迁延日月，伺机求援。可惜，这也并非长久之计。
t_en: As I could not do anything about them, I split my body up and escaped to avoid harm. I bided my time for a chance to seek assistance. Unfortunately, this was not a sustainable long-term plan.

t_ch: 唔…你的意思是，你把自己的火种藏起来了？
t_en: Uh... What you mean is that you hid your own Coreflame?

t_ch: 正是，分作了三份。一份藏于「金枝誓言」中，一份与{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}的余火一道封入琥珀……
t_en: Indeed, I split it into three. I hid one within the Golden Bough of Vows, and sealed another in the amber along with {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}'s remaining embers...

t_ch: 至于那最后一份…<color=#dbc291ff>如今正在那刻夏的躯壳中，亟待修复呢</color>。
t_en: As for the last one... <color=#dbc291ff>It's currently in Anaxa's body, which is in dire need of repair</color>.

t_ch: 什么？难道说，你是用这种方法……
t_en: What? Do you mean that, you're using such a method...

t_ch: 呵呵，毕竟树庭的学者们为了捍卫吾之火种，不惜赴火蹈刃，从容就义…吾既贵为尊神，若只眼睁睁看着人子们舍己成人，未免太没面子。
t_en: Hehe, after all, the scholars of the Grove have always been willing to lay down their lives to defend my Coreflame... As a respected god, it would be too embarrassing if I were to do nothing and simply watch the children of humanity give up their lives for me.

t_ch: 尤其是那名唤那刻夏的异端——不惜磔裂灵魂当作础石，引发奇迹，在这树庭中布下天罗地网，将一众黑潮造物困于樊笼中，以免殃及他方。
t_en: Especially that heretic named Anaxa. He did not even hesitate to tear his soul apart and use it to perform a miracle. He trapped all the creations of the black tide within the Grove so that they would not be able to harm others.

t_ch: 吾觉着这道思想如此奇异，随黑潮白白消散实属可惜，便出手救了人子一命。
t_en: His way of thinking was so out-of-the-ordinary that I felt it would be a waste for him to meet his demise in the black tide. And so, I decided to save his life.

t_ch: 当然，吾也得以匿身潜藏…嗯，这也是「等价交换」的一道侧面吧？
t_en: Of course, this also meant that I was able to conceal myself and remain hidden... Well, that's also an "equivalent exchange," right?

t_ch: 啊，人家搞明白了！所以，你是想借我们之手，把自己的火种再拼起来，还能救活那刻夏！
t_en: Ah, I finally understand! So, you want us to lend you a hand in piecing your Coreflame back together! We'll also be able to save Anaxa that way!

t_ch: 真是只伶俐的小兔子。如此，吾既能夺回正身，汝等也能将火种和恩师迎回奥赫玛……
t_en: What a smart little bunny. This way, I'll be able to regain my true form, and you will be able to bring the Coreflame and your teacher back to Okhema...

t_ch: …还有，与诸位一道会猎于王座，将那黑衣的剑士一举拿下。
t_en: ...We'll also take down the black-robed swordmaster at the throne, together in one go.

t_ch: 可是…瑟希斯，你不是理性之泰坦嘛？
t_en: But... Cerces, aren't you the Reason Titan?

t_ch: 呵呵…虽然不得「纷争」权柄，可吾毕竟也贵为神灵哪？
t_en: Heh... Even if I do not have the authority of Strife, I'm still a god.

t_ch: 只须得各位，在那斗士剑下为吾多争取些时间…一旦火种铸成，吾便能及锋一试。
t_en: I just need you to buy me some time against the warrior's blade... Once the Coreflame is re-formed, I'll be able to show my hand.

t_ch: 交给我吧，我最会拉扯了。
t_en: Just leave it to me. Buying time is my specialty.

t_ch: 必一举拿下！
t_en: Let's take him down in one go!

t_ch: 甚好。那么，就向上攀登，到吾之王座去吧。
t_en: Excellent. Then, just continue climbing to reach my throne.

t_ch: 将「金枝誓言」化作柴薪，令理性之火种再度燎燃……
t_en: Turn the Golden Bough of Vows into firewood to reignite the Coreflame of Reason...

t_ch: 前方就是启蒙王座……
t_en: Ahead lies the Luminary Throne...

t_ch: 也是…我们即将踏上的战场。
t_en: And also... the battlefield that we're about to step onto.

t_ch: 啊，这……
t_en: Ah, this...

t_ch: 伙伴们，你们感觉到了吗？
t_en: Friends, can you feel it?

t_ch: 小小咪，怎么了？
t_en: Memmy, what's wrong?

t_ch: 这里的记忆，味道十分强烈……
t_en: The memories here have a very intense smell...

t_ch: …这是蔺草、飞沙和烈日才有的味道。
t_en: ...It's the scent of bulrush, sand, and the blazing sun.

t_ch: 这是……
t_en: Is this...

t_ch: 那刻夏老师……
t_en: Professor Anaxa...
Ah...

t_ch: {RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}没说错，他果然在这里。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} was right. He's indeed here.

t_ch: 他、他还在昏迷吗？{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}又在哪儿？
t_en: I—Is he still unconscious? Where's {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}?

t_ch: 那个黑袍的家伙是…？
t_en: Who is this black-robed guy...?

t_ch: 这个人，它就是刚才那缕味道、回忆的源头…不，它简直就是回忆本身！
t_en: This person is the source of the smell and the memory... No, he's basically the memory itself!

t_ch: 燃烧的仙境、破碎的太阳，还有……
t_en: The burning paradise, the shattered sun, and...

t_ch: …杀戮、死亡和毁灭。
t_en: ...Carnage. Death and destruction.

t_ch: 各位，做好准备…想必它就是{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}方才所说的，自黑潮中脱胎的猎手了——
t_en: Everyone, brace yourself... This must be the hunter reborn from the black tide that {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} was talking about...

t_ch: 「黑色」的「利剑」和「斗篷」……
t_en: The black sword and cloak...

t_ch: 那缕残纱的主人…送来{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}死雾的北风。
t_en: The owner of the piece of cloth... The north wind that sent over the deathly fog of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 并非…半神。
t_en: You're not... demigods.

t_ch: 退下。或者，死。
t_en: Stand down. Or die.

t_ch: 大家…快逃！只有我们…只有我们是赢不了它的……
t_en: Quick... run! It's just us... We won't be able to defeat them...

t_ch: 别怕，我来保护大家。
t_en: Don't worry, I'll protect everyone.

t_ch: 等到泰坦进攻就会好起来的。
t_en: Things will get better when the Titan attacks.

t_ch: 嗯，我们尽量为{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}争取时间。
t_en: That's right, let's do our best to buy time for {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 现、现在逃还来得及吗…
t_en: I—Is there still time for us to escape now...

t_ch: 它已经发现我们了…我们尽量为{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}争取时间。
t_en: He has already discovered us... Let's do our best to buy time for {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 缇、缇安也会保护大家的，缇安很勇敢！
t_en: T—Trianne will also protect everyone! Trianne is brave!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下……
t_en: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}...

t_ch: 唯有这次…愿「死亡」捍卫你我！
t_en: Only this time... may Death protect us!

t_ch: 浴场都是人呢。{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}被击败后，城中战士终于可以放松些时日了。
t_en: The baths are bustling. Now that {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} has fallen, the soldiers in the city can finally catch a break.

t_ch: 那是…缇宝大人和缇安大人？
t_en: Is that... Lady Tribbie and Lady Trianne?

t_ch: 唉，两位大人…真让人摸不清头脑。
t_en: It's so hard to understand what they're thinking sometimes...

t_ch: 好啦，这算是路上的小插曲。
t_en: Alright, back to business after that little detour.

t_ch: 我们接着赶路吧，阁下请跟紧我——阿格莱雅女士已经等了些时候了。
t_en: Let's keep moving. Don't stray far now — we've already kept Lady Aglaea waiting long enough.

t_ch: 看来，阁下的朋友早已到了。
t_en: It seems your friend arrived before us.

t_ch: 我看到她和缇安大人了！…可她们在围着谁呢？
t_en: Look, there she is... and Lady Trianne! But who's that they're looking at?

t_ch: 大家，跟缇安走！从奥赫玛，飞呀飞！
t_en: Everybody, follow Trianne! Fly, fly, fly away from Okhema!

t_ch: 看，很大的树！它——很大！
t_en: Look, a huge tree! It's... huge!

t_ch: 好壮观！{NICKNAME}，快记录下来吧。
t_en: Wow, it's so majestic! {NICKNAME}, hurry up and capture this moment!

t_ch: 还真是静得出奇啊…发生什么了？
t_en: This place is too quiet... What in the world is going on?

t_ch: 缇安，找到了——大家可以飞到对面去！
t_en: Trianne found it! Everybody, fly across to the other side!

t_ch: 门扉，对面…会在哪里？
t_en: The entrance on the other side... Where could it be?

t_ch: 小小灰，眼睛尖！
t_en: Little Gray's eyes are so sharp!

t_ch: 不愧是阁下。前方…应是慈爱之庭了。
t_en: I knew you would find it. The Courtyard of Storge should be just ahead of us.

t_ch: 喔…缇安会很警惕！
t_en: Oh... Trianne will be on high alert!

t_ch: 「死亡」的气息…愈发浓烈了。
t_en: The smell of Death... is becoming more and more intense.

t_ch: …就在台阶上。
t_en: There... On the steps.

t_ch: 果然，「黑色」的「利剑」和「斗篷」……
t_en: As expected... the words "black," "sword," and "cloak"...

t_ch: …指的就是「黑潮」。
t_en: ...They're talking about the black tide.

t_ch: 嗅嗅…会有记忆的气息吗？
t_en: I wonder if I'll find any memories.

t_ch: 这么多怪物……
t_en: So many monsters...

t_ch: 或许能找到有价值的记忆——人家试试看。
t_en: Maybe I'll find some useful memories here... Let me try.

t_ch: （嗯？锁住了……）
t_en: (Hm, it's locked...)

t_ch: 呀，门能打开了！原来那道讯息还是个门锁呀。
t_en: Hey, the door can finally be opened! It seems like that message also served as a lock.

t_ch: 炼金就是这么…不可思议。
t_en: Alchemy is truly... incredible.

t_ch: 「神明眷顾沃土，遍地欣欣如火……」
t_en: "Happiness abounded in this lush land by gods chosen..."

t_ch: 什、什么声音？
t_en: Wh—What's that sound?

t_ch: 走，我们去看看。
t_en: Let's go check it out.

t_ch: 慢、慢一点，不要打草惊蛇！
t_en: S—Slow down. We don't want to alert them.

t_ch: 只要令水车转动，便能随之拾级而上……
t_en: As long as we can get the water wheel turning, we'll be able to use it to ascend...

t_ch: …答案正是「唤醒这颗『心脏』」。
t_en: ...So, the solution is to "awaken this 'heart'."

t_ch: 前方是…「垂泪净身室」？
t_en: Is that the... "Chamber of Purifying Tears"?

t_ch: 记性不错。
t_en: You have a good memory.

t_ch: …你带我们来这里，想做什么？
t_en: ...Why exactly did you bring us here?

t_ch: 嗯？宝珠映出的时空…生着睡莲呢。
t_en: Hm? The time dimension revealed by the orb shows... water lilies growing there.

t_ch: 这花看起来软蓬蓬的…嘿，我跳！
t_en: This flower looks so soft and fluffy... Heh, watch this!

t_ch: 嗯？这里竟还存放着<color=#dbc291ff>「灵液匣」</color>么……
t_en: Huh? There are <color=#dbc291ff>ichor vessels</color> stored here...

t_ch: 哇…原来花是这样长出来的呀！
t_en: Wow... So, this is how flowers are grown!

t_ch: 呵呵…好生伶俐哪。
t_en: Hehe... How smart.

t_ch: 但愿这不是她的陷阱……
t_en: Let's hope that this is not a trap set by her...

t_ch: 池塘后方有条密道，走这边快些。
t_en: There's a secret passageway behind the pond. It's faster if we take that path.

t_ch: …你怎么知道得这么清楚？
t_en: ...How do you know this place so well?

t_ch: 毕竟…我是七贤人之一哪？
t_en: Well... I'm one of the Seven Sages after all.

t_ch: 好了，去乘坐水车吧？吾在上边恭候各位。
t_en: Alright, go ride the water wheel. I'll wait for you up there.

t_ch: 呃…原来你根本用不着水车啊。
t_en: Eh... So, you don't actually have to take the water wheel?

t_ch: 说起来，汝等还有位红发的同伴不是？
t_en: Speaking of which, don't you also have a red-haired companion?

t_ch: 不是吧…你到底对我们了解到什么程度？
t_en: Seriously... Exactly how much do you know about us?

t_ch: 呵呵，没多少。只是似乎听见蜜蜂嗡嗡振翅的声音了。
t_en: Hehe, not too much. It's just that I seem to hear the sound of a bee buzzing around.

t_ch: 阁下，你的比喻…真不敢让人恭维。
t_en: Lady, your metaphors... are not worthy of praise at all.

t_ch: 呼，终于能呼吸到新鲜空气了！
t_en: Phew, finally! Some fresh air!

t_ch: 嘶，吹得人家毛冷飕飕的……
t_en: Brr... But the wind feels so chilly...

t_ch: 卡吕普索…你到底在隐瞒什么？
t_en: Calypso... Just what are you hiding?

t_ch: 唔，金线抖得越来越厉害了……
t_en: Ugh, the golden thread is vibrating more and more violently...

t_ch: 大家多加小心。
t_en: Everyone, let's be even more cautious.

t_ch: 没人…等等，「神识之蝶」不见了？
t_en: There's no one... Hold on, the Butterfly of Divine Mind is gone?

t_ch: 声音是从「逐星天井」传来的，我们快走。
t_en: The voice seems to be coming from the Star-Chase Atrium.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#做得好，伙伴…！}咕嘟咕嘟咕嘟……{RUBY_E#}
t_en: {RUBY_B#Well done, friend!}Bloop bloop bloop...{RUBY_E#}

t_ch: {RUBY_B#人家感觉…凉快多了…！}咕嘟咕嘟咕嘟咕嘟……{RUBY_E#}
t_en: {RUBY_B#It feels so much cooler now!}Bloop bloop bloop bloop...{RUBY_E#}

t_ch: 毛发…正在烘干……
t_en: My fur... still drying...

t_ch: 天上飘来睡莲了…好厉害！大家是不是可以走上去？
t_en: I see water lilies floating in the sky... So cool! Can we walk on it?

t_ch: 打通了！大家，跑快点，小小咪已经烫得跳起来了！
t_en: It's connected! Let's hurry! Memmy is already bouncing around due to the heat!

t_ch: 才、才不是…这是人家表达歉意的甜美舞蹈…！
t_en: N—No... This is a sweet little dance to express my apologies...!

t_ch: 好暖和…好舒服……
t_en: So warm... much comfort...

t_ch: 糟了，阁下。我能闻到香味了。
t_en: Oh no, I'm starting to smell something delicious.

t_ch: 哈哈…那一定是人家忍不住释放的优雅魅力吧？
t_en: Haha... That must be because I can't help giving off an irresistible charm.

t_ch: 人家现在热得发烫……
t_en: I'm burning hot right now...

t_ch: 手感有七分…不，九分甚至十分火热呀…！
t_en: It feels like I've reached medium-well... No, perhaps I'm on the verge of becoming well-done...!

t_ch: 不可思议……
t_en: How incredible...

t_ch: 唔，接下来…把它献给蝴蝶就可以了？
t_en: Uhh, so... We just have to present it to the butterfly?

t_ch: 交给你们啦，人子们。祝君好运。
t_en: I'll leave it to you, children of humanity. May you be blessed with good fortune.
